# Extracao: Module 6

- **Fonte:** Module 6.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0.01 MB

---

﻿MODULE 6 INTERNAL AND SEED LAUNCHES

Welcome to Module 6 of Product Launch Formula. This module goes more in-depth with Internal Launches and Seed Launches. These are the two primary types of launches that you will want to perfect before moving on. By the end of this module you’ll know which type of launch to use when, and how to plan and execute them.

1 Introduction [2 minutes]

2 Internal Launch Strategies [13 minutes]
This lesson is about the Internal Launch strategy. This type of launch is ideal when you have a product that's already been tested in the marketplace and you have an email list.

3 Internal Launch Timeline [6 minutes]
In this lesson you'll learn about the Internal Launch timeline, which can last anywhere from 21 to more than 45 days. The Internal Launch starts with the Pre-Prelaunch, then goes into the Prelaunch and Open Cart through to Close Cart.

4 Internal Launch Case Studies [64 minutes]
In these case studies, you'll hear from PLF Owners who've had massive wins with Internal Launches.
-Dylan and his partners built a successful business selling physical products on Amazon. They developed a system for wholesaling products, and started teaching their method to other sellers. 
-Nicholas is a fine-art artist who has led offline workshops to teach people how to paint. Then he used PLF to bring his workshop online
-Julie practiced psychology in a traditional setting. She wondered if she could take her mental health training online. Her first launch brought in $17,000, and her second launch, three times that.
-Susan does million dollar launches in her dog training niche, without JV partners. You’ve seen her Internal Launch PLCs and Sales Video, now listen to her story – it’s incredible.

5 Internal Launch Planner [no video]
The Internal Launch Planner is a step-by-step action guide to help you plan out and execute an Internal Launch. It includes email swipe copy, a target timeline, and a checklist to help keep you on track.

6 Seed Launch Strategies [9 minutes]
What if you spend all your time building a cool product, but nobody buys? In this lesson, you'll learn about the Seed Launch, which is a strategy you can use to get paid to create a product you know your market will buy.

7 Seed Launch Prelaunch Plan [7 minutes]
In this lesson you'll learn the key differences between Prelaunch Content for an Internal Launch vs. a Seed Launch.

8 Creating a Crushing Offer [12 minutes]
There are many different elements that go into creating your Seed Launch offer. It includes the “stuff” your customers or clients will receive, but more importantly it clearly conveys the transformation that results in having that “stuff.” This lesson is about how to create a great offer for your product.

9 Seed Launch Timeline [9 minutes]
In this lesson you'll dive deeper into the Seed Launch timeline, which is often a lot shorter than an Internal Launch. It starts with building your seed list and ends when you finish creating your interactive product with your early (and most excited) buyers.

10 Creating Your Seed Launch Product [14 minutes]
In this lesson you'll learn how to create and deliver your product after a successful Seed Launch.

11 Interviewing Experts [10 minutes]
The Hyper Seed Launch is a variation on the classic Seed Launch strategy where you interview experts. In this lesson you'll learn how to work with other experts in your niche to create a product. And as an added bonus, those experts can help you sell that product once it's been created!

12 Webinars and Summits [12 minutes]
This lesson is another variation of the Hyper Seed Launch using webinars and summits. This strategy uses the same approach of working with experts (covered in the last lesson), only it's delivered via webinar, teleseminar, or summit and your experts get to pitch their product at the end and you get an affiliate commission.

13 Seed Launch Case Studies [126 minutes]
In these case studies, you'll see a walkthrough of real-life examples of Seed Launches done by PLF Owners.
-Tara & David Marino, an AMAZING Case Study of a Seed Launch that only sold 6 units – but it quickly led to a business that did $500,000 (that’s a half-million dollars) in sales!
-Kami McBride was an absolute tech newbie… but did a 5-figure Seed Launch for her course "Handcrafted Healing Herbal Oils". Here you’ll find an interview, case study walkthrough, and swipfile of Kami's Seed Launch.
-JJ Virgin, author of the NY Times Bestseller "The Sugar Impact Diet" shares how she developed and wrote her book using a Seed Launch and made six figures in the process – before the book was even written
-Erik Solbakken, after 26 years as an accountant he found a surprisingly hungry audience and did his first launch, bringing in $10,000 before even creating his product. In just 10 months after starting his online business, Erik made $220,000 in revenue.

14 Seed Launch Walkthrough [103 minutes]
In this case study, you'll see my walkthrough of a real-life example of Prelaunch Content and Sales video created by PLF Owner Kami McBride in her Seed Launch.

15 Seed Launch Planner [no video]
The Seed Launch Planner is a step-by-step action guide to help you plan out and execute your Seed Launch. It includes email swipe copy, a timeline, and a checklist to help you stay on track.
